mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, password = #{password}, avatar_id = #{avatarId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teachers (user_id, name, title, department, bio) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{title}, #{department}, #{bio})
mapper.update: UPDATE teachers SET user_id = #{userId}, name = #{name}, title = #{title}, department = #{department}, bio = #{bio} WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM students WHERE student_number = #{studentNumber} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (user_id, name, student_number, major, grade, class, department, gender) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{studentNumber}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{clazz}, #{department}, #{gender})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.credit), 0) FROM course_enrollments ce JOIN course_schedules cs ON ce.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE ce.student_id = #{studentId}
